title: CT2.terminal.ct10.criticality completed discharge record — CT10 terminal — survivor and criticality-refinement datum
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for semantic CT2-v2 node CT2.terminal.ct10.criticality. It fixes the runtime identity, presentation order, successful status, and exact contract evidence without converting the semantic ID back to a numbered obligation ID.

tacticId.description: Owning tactic discriminator for CT2.terminal.ct10.criticality; it must be CT2.

nodeId.description: Stable semantic runtime identifier for CT10 terminal — survivor and criticality-refinement datum.

nodeNumber.description: One-based presentation-order index for CT2.terminal.ct10.criticality; it is not part of the semantic identity.

status.description: Required successful completion state for CT2.terminal.ct10.criticality, matching its terminal runtime role.

dischargedContracts.description: Exact contract families discharged at CT2.terminal.ct10.criticality: S-Rout, S-Trig.

contains.description: Requires S-Rout, which constructs the declared typed CT3 or CT10 payload.
Requires S-Trig, which certifies that the selected consumer accepts the routed payload.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract instances for CT2.terminal.ct10.criticality; one S-Rout, S-Trig record is required for each declared family.

schema.description: Discriminator for the S-Rout evidence at CT2.terminal.ct10.criticality; this instance constructs the declared typed CT3 or CT10 payload.
Discriminator for the S-Trig evidence at CT2.terminal.ct10.criticality; this instance certifies that the selected consumer accepts the routed payload.

producedPayloads.description: Payload family delivered by CT2.terminal.ct10.criticality to CT10.

statement.informal: CT10 terminal — survivor and criticality-refinement datum.

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Supply the declared proof-carrying state, decision, certificate, or payload. Every outgoing edge is available only through its named typed constructor and evidence slots.
